channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-09
item.description:
Our community has seen a flurry of activity across multiple projects, with notable updates in `giladfeldman/docpluck`, `Davidvandijcke/coarse`, and `giladfeldman/escicheck`. The `docpluck` project has made significant progress, with fixes implemented for the "glyph" and "render" modules, as well as updates to documentation. Meanwhile, the `coarse` project has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `escicheck` has synced changes from the `escicheckapp` repository, bringing it up to date with the latest `effectcheck` version. Additionally, smaller updates have been made to `MicheleNuijten/statcheck`, `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve`, and `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward`, demonstrating the community's commitment to ongoing improvement and maintenance. These updates highlight the connections between our projects and the collaborative spirit of our community.

47 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck21 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. The merge commit was made to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, "admin updates" were made, as per the commit message. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The changes were relatively minor, with no new features or modules added beyond the admin updates.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
